mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_monitor_server_log (id, cpu_load, mem_used, mem_total, disk_used, disk_total, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{cpuLoad}, #{memUsed}, #{memTotal}, #{diskUsed}, #{diskTotal}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, cpu_load AS cpuLoad, mem_used AS memUsed, mem_total AS memTotal, disk_used AS diskUsed, disk_total AS diskTotal, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_monitor_server_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
